metadata.description: SilkSurf performance baseline -- post L1-L8 crate integration

notes: fused_pipeline_us: FusedWorkspace::run() steady-state (no alloc, DOM unchanged)
css_cache_hit_us: cascade per-iter with warm StyleIndex and CascadeWorkspace
full_render_us: fused_pipeline + rasterize_skia_into with pre-allocated buffer
All times from release build (cargo run --release) on local dev machine
Previous baseline (2026-01-29) was pre-taffy/cosmic-text; not comparable
